description:
There's tons of confusion about what we're all building towards with Personal AI. Are we building Agents? AI Harnesses? To what end?

In this video I lay why I think we're all heading towards a single place that we should start getting ready for now.

I think getting this early will put you 1-3 years ahead of everyone.

---

 PAI repository (open source):
 https://github.com/danielmiessler/PAI

 The 2016 thesis the video builds on:
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/real-internet-of-things
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/personal-ai-assistants-will-soon-interfaces-world

 The Personal AI Maturity Model (shown in the video):
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/personal-ai-maturity-model

 PAI and the single Digital Assistant:
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/personal-ais-will-mediate-everything
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/ais-next-big-thing-is-digital-assistants
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/ai-powered-visual-sensors-will-be-wielded-by-digital-assistants-to-build-us-custom-uis

 Current state → Ideal state (The Algorithm):
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/the-last-algorithm
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/nobody-is-talking-about-generalized-hill-climbing

 Harnesses, agents, and AI system design:
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/good-and-bad-harness-engineering
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/bitter-lesson-engineering
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/principals-vs-agents

 TELOS / framework for human understanding:
 https://danielmiessler.com/blog/introducing-substrate

  Human 3.0 and activation:
  https://danielmiessler.com/blog/human-3-creator-revolution
  https://danielmiessler.com/blog/its-time-for-full-activation

  Fabric (the pattern framework mentioned):
  https://danielmiessler.com/blog/fabric-origin-story
  https://github.com/danielmiessler/fabric

  How everything fits together:
  https://danielmiessler.com/blog/how-my-projects-fit-together

  The main Personal AI Infrastructure post:
  https://danielmiessler.com/blog/personal-ai-infrastructure

  Human 3.0 platform: https://human3.unsupervised-learning.com
  Newsletter: https://unsupervised-learning.com
fulltitle: We're All Building a Single Digital Assistant
